title: Nutty Crispy Ethiopian Peanut Stir-fry
description: A monsoon-inspired, crispy peanut dish infused with the umami flavors of doubanjiang and served as a satisfying snack that's both nutty and Paleo-friendly.

ingredients.name: Peanuts
ingredients.notes: Make sure they are roasted until crispy.

ingredients.name: Doubanjiang paste
ingredients.notes: Use less if you prefer milder flavor.

ingredients.name: Red onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped to the size of matchsticks for a crisp texture.

ingredients.name: Green bell pepper
ingredients.notes: Add color and crunch without overpowering the dish.

ingredients.name: Thyme leaves
ingredients.notes: Optional garnish for extra flavor and color.

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Add the peanuts to coat with oil from roasting.
Add the doubanjiang paste, red onion, and green bell pepper to the pan, stir-frying until the peppers soften but remain crisp.
Sprinkle sesame seeds on top of the mixture for extra crunchiness.
Once all ingredients are thoroughly combined and coated with the peanut paste, remove from heat. If desired, sprinkle thyme leaves for garnish.
